title: quercus phanera
intro: Quercus phanera, also known as the Himalayan or Chinese evergreen oak, is a species of flowering plant in the beech family Fagaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Quercus phanera include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Quercus phanera can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
